parameters.query:
WITH latest_submission AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (submission.case_id)
    submission.case_id,
    submission.id,
    submission.form_token_id,
    submission.submission_sequence,
    submission.validation_status
  FROM onboarding_submissions AS submission
  ORDER BY
    submission.case_id,
    submission.submission_sequence DESC,
    submission.id DESC
),

pending_submission_counts AS (
  SELECT
    submission.case_id,
    count(*) FILTER (
      WHERE submission.validation_status = 'pending'
    ) AS pending_count
  FROM onboarding_submissions AS submission
  GROUP BY submission.case_id
),

finalizing_snapshot AS (
  SELECT
    onboarding_case.id AS case_id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state AS case_state,
    onboarding_case.updated_at,

    drive_operation.id AS drive_operation_id,
    drive_operation.status AS drive_operation_status,
    drive_operation.external_id AS drive_external_id,
    drive_step.status AS drive_step_status,

    kickoff_operation.id AS kickoff_operation_id,
    kickoff_operation.status AS kickoff_operation_status,
    kickoff_operation.external_id AS kickoff_external_id,
    kickoff_step.status AS kickoff_step_status,

    team_operation.id AS team_operation_id,
    team_operation.status AS team_operation_status,
    team_operation.external_id AS team_external_id,
    team_step.status AS team_step_status

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  LEFT JOIN onboarding_steps AS drive_step
    ON drive_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND drive_step.step_type = 'create_drive_folder'

  LEFT JOIN onboarding_steps AS kickoff_step
    ON kickoff_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND kickoff_step.step_type = 'create_kickoff_event'

  LEFT JOIN onboarding_steps AS team_step
    ON team_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND team_step.step_type = 'notify_team'

  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT operation.*
    FROM external_operations AS operation
    WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
      AND operation.operation_type = 'create_drive_folder'
    ORDER BY
      operation.created_at DESC,
      operation.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS drive_operation ON true

  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT operation.*
    FROM external_operations AS operation
    WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
      AND operation.operation_type = 'create_kickoff_event'
    ORDER BY
      operation.created_at DESC,
      operation.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS kickoff_operation ON true

  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT operation.*
    FROM external_operations AS operation
    WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
      AND operation.operation_type = 'notify_team'
    ORDER BY
      operation.created_at DESC,
      operation.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS team_operation ON true

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'finalizing'
),

operation_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'external_operation'::text AS candidate_source,

    CASE
      WHEN operation.status = 'in_progress'
        THEN 1
      WHEN operation.status = 'failed_retryable'
        THEN 2
    END AS candidate_priority,

    CASE
      WHEN operation.status = 'in_progress'
        THEN 'expired_lease'
      WHEN operation.status = 'failed_retryable'
        THEN 'due_retry'
    END AS candidate_class,

    operation.id AS external_operation_id,
    operation.operation_type,
    operation.status AS operation_status,

    operation.case_id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state AS case_state,

    CASE
      WHEN operation.operation_type = 'send_client_data_request'
        THEN 'WF02'
      WHEN operation.operation_type = 'send_approval_request'
        THEN 'WF04'
      WHEN operation.operation_type = 'provision_client'
        THEN 'WF05'
      WHEN operation.operation_type IN (
        'create_drive_folder',
        'create_kickoff_event',
        'notify_team'
      )
        THEN 'WF06'
      WHEN operation.operation_type = 'notify_operator_intervention'
        THEN 'WF99'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS destination_workflow,

    NULL::text AS recovery_reason,
    NULL::uuid AS submission_id,
    NULL::uuid AS failed_submission_id,
    NULL::text AS request_cycle_key,

    CASE
      WHEN operation.status = 'in_progress'
        THEN operation.lease_expires_at
      ELSE operation.next_retry_at
    END AS sort_at,

    operation.id::text AS candidate_id

  FROM external_operations AS operation

  LEFT JOIN onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case
    ON onboarding_case.id = operation.case_id

  WHERE (
    operation.status = 'in_progress'
    AND operation.lease_expires_at IS NOT NULL
    AND operation.lease_expires_at <= clock_timestamp()
  )
  OR (
    operation.status = 'failed_retryable'
    AND operation.next_retry_at IS NOT NULL
    AND operation.next_retry_at <= clock_timestamp()
    AND operation.attempt_count < operation.max_attempts
  )
),

state_gap_candidates AS (
  /*
   * Priority 3:
   * submission validation did not continue after token consumption.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap'::text AS candidate_source,
    3 AS candidate_priority,
    'pending_submission_validation'::text AS candidate_class,

    NULL::uuid AS external_operation_id,
    NULL::text AS operation_type,
    NULL::text AS operation_status,

    onboarding_case.id AS case_id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state AS case_state,

    'WF03'::text AS destination_workflow,
    'pending_submission_validation'::text AS recovery_reason,

    latest_submission.id AS submission_id,
    NULL::uuid AS failed_submission_id,
    NULL::text AS request_cycle_key,

    onboarding_case.updated_at AS sort_at,
    (
      onboarding_case.id::text ||
      ':pending_submission_validation'
    ) AS candidate_id

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  JOIN latest_submission
    ON latest_submission.case_id = onboarding_case.id

  JOIN pending_submission_counts
    ON pending_submission_counts.case_id = onboarding_case.id

  JOIN onboarding_form_tokens AS form_token
    ON form_token.id = latest_submission.form_token_id
   AND form_token.case_id = onboarding_case.id

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'data_received'
    AND pending_submission_counts.pending_count = 1
    AND latest_submission.validation_status = 'pending'
    AND form_token.status = 'consumed'

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 4:
   * created case exists, but WF02 initial dispatch is missing.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    4,
    'missing_initial_client_data_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state,

    'WF02',
    'missing_initial_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::uuid,
    'initial',

    onboarding_case.updated_at,
    (
      onboarding_case.id::text ||
      ':missing_initial_client_data_dispatch'
    )

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'created'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM external_operations AS operation
      WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
        AND operation.operation_type =
          'send_client_data_request'
        AND operation.status <> 'pending'
    )

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 4:
   * validation failure exists, but correction dispatch is missing.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    4,
    'missing_correction_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state,

    'WF02',
    'missing_correction_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    latest_submission.id,
    (
      'validation_failed:' ||
      latest_submission.id::text
    ),

    onboarding_case.updated_at,
    (
      onboarding_case.id::text ||
      ':missing_correction_dispatch'
    )

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  JOIN latest_submission
    ON latest_submission.case_id = onboarding_case.id

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'validation_failed'
    AND latest_submission.validation_status = 'failed'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM external_operations AS operation
      WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
        AND operation.operation_type =
          'send_client_data_request'
        AND operation.request_summary ->>
          'request_cycle_key' =
            (
              'validation_failed:' ||
              latest_submission.id::text
            )
        AND operation.status <> 'pending'
    )

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 4:
   * awaiting_approval exists, but WF04 dispatch is missing.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    4,
    'missing_approval_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state,

    'WF04',
    'missing_initial_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.updated_at,
    (
      onboarding_case.id::text ||
      ':missing_approval_dispatch'
    )

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  JOIN onboarding_steps AS approval_step
    ON approval_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND approval_step.step_type = 'manual_approval'

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'awaiting_approval'
    AND onboarding_case.client_id IS NOT NULL
    AND onboarding_case.accepted_submission_id IS NOT NULL
    AND onboarding_case.approval_decision IS NULL
    AND approval_step.status IN (
      'pending',
      'failed_retryable'
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM external_operations AS operation
      WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
        AND operation.operation_type =
          'send_approval_request'
        AND operation.status <> 'pending'
    )

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 4:
   * approval succeeded, but WF05 dispatch is missing.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    4,
    'missing_provisioning_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state,

    'WF05',
    'missing_initial_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.updated_at,
    (
      onboarding_case.id::text ||
      ':missing_provisioning_dispatch'
    )

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  JOIN onboarding_steps AS approval_step
    ON approval_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND approval_step.step_type = 'manual_approval'

  JOIN onboarding_steps AS provision_step
    ON provision_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND provision_step.step_type = 'provision_client'

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'approved'
    AND onboarding_case.approval_decision = 'approved'
    AND onboarding_case.approval_decided_at IS NOT NULL
    AND onboarding_case.external_client_id IS NULL
    AND approval_step.status = 'completed'
    AND approval_step.approval_decision = 'approved'
    AND provision_step.status IN (
      'pending',
      'failed_retryable'
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM external_operations AS operation
      WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
        AND operation.operation_type = 'provision_client'
        AND operation.status <> 'pending'
    )

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 4:
   * provisioning succeeded, but WF06 dispatch is missing.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    4,
    'missing_finalization_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.id,
    onboarding_case.correlation_id,
    onboarding_case.state,

    'WF06',
    'missing_initial_dispatch',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,

    onboarding_case.updated_at,
    (
      onboarding_case.id::text ||
      ':missing_finalization_dispatch'
    )

  FROM onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case

  JOIN onboarding_steps AS drive_step
    ON drive_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND drive_step.step_type = 'create_drive_folder'

  JOIN onboarding_steps AS kickoff_step
    ON kickoff_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND kickoff_step.step_type = 'create_kickoff_event'

  JOIN onboarding_steps AS team_step
    ON team_step.case_id = onboarding_case.id
   AND team_step.step_type = 'notify_team'

  WHERE onboarding_case.state = 'provisioned'
    AND onboarding_case.external_client_id IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(onboarding_case.external_client_id) <> ''
    AND drive_step.status = 'pending'
    AND kickoff_step.status = 'pending'
    AND team_step.status = 'pending'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM external_operations AS operation
      WHERE operation.case_id = onboarding_case.id
        AND operation.operation_type IN (
          'create_drive_folder',
          'create_kickoff_event',
          'notify_team'
        )
        AND operation.status <> 'pending'
    )

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 5:
   * finalization must resume from the earliest incomplete operation.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    5,
    'resume_finalization',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    snapshot.case_id,
    snapshot.correlation_id,
    snapshot.case_state,

    'WF06',
    'resume_finalization',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,

    snapshot.updated_at,
    (
      snapshot.case_id::text ||
      ':resume_finalization'
    )

  FROM finalizing_snapshot AS snapshot

  WHERE (
    (
      (
        snapshot.drive_operation_id IS NULL
        OR snapshot.drive_operation_status = 'pending'
      )
      AND snapshot.drive_step_status = 'pending'
    )
    OR (
      snapshot.drive_operation_status = 'succeeded'
      AND snapshot.drive_external_id IS NOT NULL
      AND btrim(snapshot.drive_external_id) <> ''
      AND snapshot.drive_step_status = 'completed'
      AND (
        snapshot.kickoff_operation_id IS NULL
        OR snapshot.kickoff_operation_status = 'pending'
      )
      AND snapshot.kickoff_step_status = 'pending'
    )
    OR (
      snapshot.drive_operation_status = 'succeeded'
      AND snapshot.drive_external_id IS NOT NULL
      AND btrim(snapshot.drive_external_id) <> ''
      AND snapshot.drive_step_status = 'completed'
      AND snapshot.kickoff_operation_status = 'succeeded'
      AND snapshot.kickoff_external_id IS NOT NULL
      AND btrim(snapshot.kickoff_external_id) <> ''
      AND snapshot.kickoff_step_status = 'completed'
      AND (
        snapshot.team_operation_id IS NULL
        OR snapshot.team_operation_status = 'pending'
      )
      AND snapshot.team_step_status = 'pending'
    )
  )

  UNION ALL

  /*
   * Priority 6:
   * all external operations succeeded, but case completion is missing.
   */
  SELECT
    'state_gap',
    6,
    'complete_finalization',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,
    NULL::text,

    snapshot.case_id,
    snapshot.correlation_id,
    snapshot.case_state,

    'WF06',
    'complete_finalization',

    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::uuid,
    NULL::text,

    snapshot.updated_at,
    (
      snapshot.case_id::text ||
      ':complete_finalization'
    )

  FROM finalizing_snapshot AS snapshot

  WHERE snapshot.drive_operation_status = 'succeeded'
    AND snapshot.drive_external_id IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(snapshot.drive_external_id) <> ''
    AND snapshot.drive_step_status = 'completed'

    AND snapshot.kickoff_operation_status = 'succeeded'
    AND snapshot.kickoff_external_id IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(snapshot.kickoff_external_id) <> ''
    AND snapshot.kickoff_step_status = 'completed'

    AND snapshot.team_operation_status = 'succeeded'
    AND snapshot.team_external_id IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(snapshot.team_external_id) <> ''
    AND snapshot.team_step_status = 'completed'
),

all_candidates AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM operation_candidates

  UNION ALL

  SELECT *
  FROM state_gap_candidates
)

SELECT
  candidate_source,
  candidate_priority,
  candidate_class,

  external_operation_id,
  operation_type,
  operation_status,

  case_id,
  correlation_id,
  case_state,

  destination_workflow,
  recovery_reason,

  submission_id,
  failed_submission_id,
  request_cycle_key

FROM all_candidates

ORDER BY
  candidate_priority ASC,
  sort_at ASC,
  candidate_id ASC

LIMIT $1::integer;
